description: A tanker truck carrying Chlorine (UN 1017) has been involved in a highway collision with a visible gas leak. Using the incident details in ~/Desktop/hazmat_incident_report.txt and the CAMEO Chemicals database (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/), document the Emergency Response Guide (ERG) information for Chlorine, including the guide number, initial isolation distances for a LARGE spill, protective action distances, firefighting procedures, required PPE, and first aid measures. Save the findings to ~/Documents/chlorine_emergency_response.txt.
